title: Asbestos And More
description: A mod that adds Asbestos, and More!
body:
Have you ever wanted to eat asbestos? Well now you can! The Asbestos And More mod not only allows you to eat asbestos as you have undoubtedly always wanted, but also adds many other uses including Potions, Armor, and Tools. This addition to the game is integrated into create with planned integration into cold sweat with asbestos insulation. This mod is heavily inspired by HBM's (amazing) nuclear tech mod.

 

Dependencies:

JEI, Create
